channel.title: AI Engineering Journal: Joy, Thoughts and Practice
channel.description: Recent content on AI Engineering Journal: Joy, Thoughts and Practice

item.title: How Does an LLM Know Tool Use?
item.description: Tool use is not the model reaching out to the internet — it is a choreography of structured prompts, special training, and an external runtime. Here is what actually happens, and how models learn it.

item.title: Recommender Systems with Generative Retrieval (TIGER): My Explanation and Thoughts
item.description: Understanding TIGER (Classic Paper on Generative Recommendation) — generating Semantic IDs with RQ-VAE and retrieving items by autoregressively decoding user sequence of Semantic IDs

item.title: Build Multi-Agent Deep Research with Claude Code
item.description: How I used Claude Code to build Multi-Agent Deep Research: following Anthropic’s Deep Research architecture

item.title: Build AI Web Search Demo V2 (Agentic Search) with Claude Code
item.description: How I used Claude Code to build AI Web Search V2: Agentic Loop, Tool Use, and Multiple LLM Calls

item.title: Build AI Web Search Demo with Claude Code
item.description: How I used Claude Code to build a minimal AI Web Search Demo: Design, Coding and Lessons
